title: lazarum russell-smithii
intro: Lazarum russell-smithii, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species native to southern Africa, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Lazarum russell-smithii lie in its root, which contains various alkaloids, including harpagoside, harpagoquinone, and harpagophylline, that have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of using Lazarum russell-smithii include relief from arthritis, back pain, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as improved digestion and reduced stress levels. Lazarum russell-smithii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
